tasks.subject: Task 1: Swap gbrain-skills shim for native bind-mount and rename env var
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Image builds without inotify watcher, compose template mounts mono/skills read-only into Hermes category path, periodic sync loop reads SKILL_SYNC_INTERVAL.

**Files:**
- Modify: assistant/docker-compose.yml
- Modify: assistant/hermes/Dockerfile
- Modify: assistant/hermes/scripts/05-start-sync-brain.sh
- Delete: assistant/hermes/scripts/06-start-skills-watch.sh
- Delete: assistant/hermes/scripts/gbrain-skills-watch.sh

**Verify:** cd assistant && ! grep -rn 'BRAIN_SYNC_INTERVAL|gbrain-skills|inotify' docker-compose.yml hermes/Dockerfile hermes/scripts/ && MONO_REPO_PATH=/tmp/mono docker compose config | grep -E 'skills:/opt/data/skills/mono:ro|SKILL_SYNC_INTERVAL' && docker compose build hermes

```json:metadata
{"files":["assistant/docker-compose.yml","assistant/hermes/Dockerfile","assistant/hermes/scripts/05-start-sync-brain.sh","assistant/hermes/scripts/06-start-skills-watch.sh","assistant/hermes/scripts/gbrain-skills-watch.sh"],"verifyCommand":"cd assistant && ! grep -rn 'BRAIN_SYNC_INTERVAL\\|gbrain-skills\\|inotify' docker-compose.yml hermes/Dockerfile hermes/scripts/ && MONO_REPO_PATH=/tmp/mono docker compose config | grep -E 'skills:/opt/data/skills/mono:ro|SKILL_SYNC_INTERVAL' && docker compose build hermes","acceptanceCriteria":["compose.yml has no gbrain-skills/BRAIN_SYNC_INTERVAL refs","compose.yml has skills:/opt/data/skills/mono:ro mount","compose.yml has SKILL_SYNC_INTERVAL env","Dockerfile no inotify-tools / no deleted COPYs","05-start-sync-brain reads SKILL_SYNC_INTERVAL","watcher scripts deleted","compose config + build succeed"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Update operator-facing docs (.env.example, README, UPGRADE)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Operators learn the new mono layout, the renamed env var, the read-only mount semantics, and how to migrate an existing deployment.

**Files:**
- Modify: assistant/.env.example
- Modify: assistant/README.md
- Modify: UPGRADE.md

**Verify:** grep -q '^SKILL_SYNC_INTERVAL=300$' assistant/.env.example && ! grep -q '^BRAIN_SYNC_INTERVAL' assistant/.env.example && grep -q 'SKILL_SYNC_INTERVAL' assistant/README.md && ! grep -qE '\| `BRAIN_SYNC_INTERVAL`' assistant/README.md && grep -q '2026-06-23' UPGRADE.md

```json:metadata
{"files":["assistant/.env.example","assistant/README.md","UPGRADE.md"],"verifyCommand":"grep -q '^SKILL_SYNC_INTERVAL=300$' assistant/.env.example && ! grep -q '^BRAIN_SYNC_INTERVAL' assistant/.env.example && grep -q 'SKILL_SYNC_INTERVAL' assistant/README.md && ! grep -qE '\\| \\`BRAIN_SYNC_INTERVAL\\`' assistant/README.md && grep -q '2026-06-23' UPGRADE.md","acceptanceCriteria":[".env.example mono block updated",".env.example uses SKILL_SYNC_INTERVAL=300","README env table row replaced","README documents read-only mono category","UPGRADE.md has 2026-06-23 entry"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Deploy to WMC server and verify spec checklist
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Live deployment on cloud_user@ubuntu-8gb-ash-1 (/opt/wmc-agent-swarm) reflects the new wiring; all seven spec verification items pass. No new commit.

**Files (on host):**
- Modify: /opt/wmc-agent-swarm/assistant/.env (rename BRAIN_SYNC_INTERVAL -> SKILL_SYNC_INTERVAL)
- Bootstrap: /opt/wmc-mono/skills/ (rename from gbrain-skills/ if non-empty, else create + placeholder skill)

**Verify:** ssh cloud_user@ubuntu-8gb-ash-1 'docker exec -u hermes WMC-assistant sh -c "HERMES_HOME=/opt/data hermes skills list" | grep -c mono' (>= 1)

```json:metadata
{"files":["/opt/wmc-agent-swarm/assistant/.env","/opt/wmc-mono/skills/wmc-placeholder/SKILL.md"],"verifyCommand":"ssh cloud_user@ubuntu-8gb-ash-1 'docker exec -u hermes WMC-assistant sh -c \"HERMES_HOME=/opt/data hermes skills list\" | grep -c mono'","acceptanceCriteria":["spec item 1 passes","spec item 2 passes","spec item 3 passes","spec item 4 passes","spec item 5 passes","spec item 6 passes","spec item 7 passes"]}
```
